fr_360power_desc: Swing on the 360° spinning spokes of this powerful pendulum!
fr_behemothswing360_desc: This towering pendulum ride swings to incredible heights and drops you into freefall on its freely rotating gondola.
fr_bigwheel_desc: Enjoy a spectacular vista on a giant Ferris Wheel.
fr_boardslide_desc: Glide along the rails on this spinning carriage.
fr_bumpinderby_desc: Get behind the wheel and bash those bumpers!
fr_buoyancy_desc: This diving bell pulls you down into the depths and sends you shooting back to the surface!
fr_chairoplane_desc: This suspended carousel will carry you through the air!
fr_clockwork_desc: Spin in perfectly synchronised and continuous motions.
fr_collider_desc: Rise to the occasion in a circulating gondola wheel.
fr_cube_desc: Brace yourself for terrifying angles, spindles, and quadrilaterals!
fr_forge_desc: Spin, scream and soar at the whim of these giant robot arms!
fr_frenzyfrill_desc: Be hypnotised by the movements of this rapid horizontal ring ride.
fr_fullflight_desc: Take to the skies in floorless rotating carriages!
fr_grandcarousel_desc: Watch the world spin from this elegant carousel.
fr_hellionring_desc: Hold your nerve as you build momentum and enter a never-ending loop!
fr_helterskelter_desc: Grab a mat and slide down the classic spiral slide.
fr_hswing_desc: Swing to the extreme on this pulse-pounding pendulum ride.
fr_hyperspin_desc: Spin the day away on this open-top waltzer.
fr_insanity_desc: This looping ride will make you lose your mind!
fr_ironclaw_desc: Swing in the grips of this high-flying pendulum claw.
fr_kickflip_desc: This spinning conveyer belt will take you on a terrifying trip!
fr_mecharoller_desc: This huge rotating platform leaves you spinning from its hinges at dizzying heights.
fr_monsoonchute_desc: Drop into the water and create a spectacular deluge!
fr_overpower_desc: Experience terrifying and disorientating rotations on this large swinging platform.
fr_parallelogram_desc: Travel a full turn from your seat whilst keeping a level head.
fr_pathosiii_desc: Spin up, down, and all around on this multi-axis fairground staple!
fr_polarity_desc: The high-speed spokes and rotating seats will take you to your wit's end!
fr_radius_desc: This hubless observation wheel forms a giant circle in the sky.
fr_resurgence_desc: Drop tower ride that can raise and release the seats, or blast them upwards, allowing them to freefall multiple times.
fr_screaminator_desc: Drop into an exhilarating freefall from a monumental height.
fr_skybeam_desc: Rise into the clouds on this extended, swinging arm.
fr_skywatcher_desc: See a stunning 360° panoramic view on this giant observation tower.
fr_starwheel_desc: Experience a ferris wheel with a twist, with hidden tracks and swinging hinges.
fr_sundial_desc: Face the angles and rotations of this plummeting pendulum!
fr_sunflare_desc: This towering chair swing will have you on the edge of your seat!
fr_teacups_desc: Spin in style on this quintessential teacup ride.
fr_tinyeye_desc: Float gently on a delightful mini ferris wheel.
fr_upswing_desc: Hear the hinges creak on this traditional pendulum ride!
fr_weisshorn_desc: This undulating spinning ride has colourful lighting and an open roof.
fr_wildblue_desc: Put on a fabulous air show as you soar and dive.
